subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that hath been sent down in truth unto him who hath attained the presence of his Lord, the All-Merciful, the Most Compassionate, and whom the breezes of revelation have enfolded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب قد نزل بالحق لمن حضر لدی عرش ربه الرحمن الرحیم و اخذته نفحات الوحی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @suffering and imprisonment
